mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_comment t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbCommentEntity.id},'%')
AND t.content like concat('%',#{kbCommentEntity.content},'%')
AND t.basic_id like concat('%',#{kbCommentEntity.bId},'%')
AND t.parent_id like concat('%',#{kbCommentEntity.pId},'%')
AND t.user_id like concat('%',#{kbCommentEntity.uId},'%')
AND t.create_time > #{kbCommentEntity.createTime}
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbCommentEntity.isDeleted},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
SELECT a.id, a.basic_id, a.parent_id, a.user_id, b.nickname, b.avatar, a.content, a.create_time FROM kb_comment a left join castle_sys_user b on a.user_id = b.id WHERE a.basic_id = #{newsId}

SELECT a.id, a.basic_id, a.parent_id, a.user_id, b.real_name as nickname, b.avatar, a.content, a.create_time, a.is_reply, case when ktu.nums is null then 0 else ktu.nums end as nums, case when ktut.upStatus is null then 0 else ktut.upStatus end as upStatus FROM kb_comment a left join castle_sys_user b on a.user_id = b.id left join (SELECT count(1) as nums, comment_id FROM kb_thumbs_up GROUP BY comment_id) ktu on a.id = ktu.comment_id left join (SELECT count(1) as upStatus,comment_id,user_id FROM kb_thumbs_up GROUP BY comment_id,user_id having user_id = #{userId}) ktut on a.id = ktut.comment_id
WHERE a.basic_id = #{basicId} and a.parent_id is null and a.is_deleted = 2 order by a.create_time desc limit #{pageIndex}, #{pageSize};

SELECT a.id, a.basic_id, a.parent_id, a.user_id, b.real_name as nickname, b.avatar as avatar, a.content, a.create_time, a.is_reply, FROM kb_comment a left join castle_sys_user b on a.user_id = b.id WHERE basic_id = #{basicId} and parent_id = #{parentId} order by a.create_time desc;

SELECT a.id, a.basic_id, a.parent_id, a.user_id, b.real_name as nickname, b.avatar as avatar, a.content, a.create_time, a.is_reply, case when ktu.nums is null then 0 else ktu.nums end as nums, case when ktut.upStatus is null then 0 else ktut.upStatus end as upStatus, u.real_name as parentName, u.avatar as parentAvatar FROM kb_comment a left join castle_sys_user b on a.user_id = b.id left join kb_comment kc on a.parent_id = kc.id left join castle_sys_user u on kc.user_id = u.id left join (SELECT count(1) as nums, comment_id FROM kb_thumbs_up GROUP BY comment_id) ktu on a.id = ktu.comment_id left join (SELECT count(1) as upStatus,comment_id,user_id FROM kb_thumbs_up GROUP BY comment_id,user_id having user_id = #{userId}) ktut on a.id = ktut.comment_id WHERE a.one_id = #{oneId} and a.is_deleted = 2 order by a.create_time
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select count(1) from kb_comment where basic_id = #{bId} and is_deleted=2
SELECT us.real_name,us.avatar FROM `castle_sys_user` us JOIN kb_comment cm on us.id = cm.user_id where cm.is_deleted = 2 and us.is_deleted = 2 and cm.id = #{parentId}
select * from kb_comment where one_id = #{oneId} and is_deleted = 2 limit 1

SELECT count(a.id) FROM kb_comment a left join castle_sys_user b on a.user_id = b.id left join kb_comment kc on a.parent_id = kc.id left join castle_sys_user u on kc.user_id = u.id left join (SELECT count(1) as nums, comment_id FROM kb_thumbs_up GROUP BY comment_id) ktu on a.id = ktu.comment_id left join (SELECT count(1) as upStatus,comment_id,user_id FROM kb_thumbs_up GROUP BY comment_id,user_id having user_id = #{userId}) ktut on a.id = ktut.comment_id WHERE a.one_id = #{oneId} and a.is_deleted = 2 order by a.create_time ;
